name: drop_bread_for_teammate
description: Drop bread items toward a teammate who needs healing
parameters: z.object({ targetPlayerName: z.string().describe("The name of the teammate to receive items"), itemName: z.string().default('bread').describe("The name of the item to drop, for example bread"), quantity: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(2).describe("The number of items to drop") })
